completed_tasks.subject: Fix auto_daily_fights.py crash (list vs dict bugs)
completed_tasks.learning: Fight actions are flat list not dict, leeks is list not dict. Same bug pattern as S29 — codified in ActionCode enum now.

completed_tasks.subject: Fix analyze_recent_fights.py context filter
completed_tasks.learning: context=1 garden (rare), context=2 matchmaking (99%+), context=3 tournament. Codified in FightContext enum.

completed_tasks.subject: Analyze 3-day fight results (March 10-12)
completed_tasks.learning: 52% WR over 50 fights. RES 200+ opponents are kryptonite. 0-damage oscillation bug found. Bulb opponents help us (64% WR).

completed_tasks.subject: Create long-term Gantt chart with ordonnanced tasks
completed_tasks.learning: Bottleneck hierarchy: AI quality > equipment > level > stats. Revenue ~100K habs/day.

completed_tasks.subject: Add fight data dataclasses (ActionCode, FightContext, ChipIdLayer)
completed_tasks.learning: Enums + docstring classes prevent recurring list-vs-dict confusion. Context type on Fight model was str, should be int.

completed_tasks.subject: Buy b_laser weapon (77,490 Habs)
completed_tasks.learning: b_laser: 50±10 dmg + 50±10 heal, range 2-8, 5 TP, 3/fight. Strictly dominates Laser. API: buy_item(60).

completed_tasks.subject: AI update: b_laser integration + anti-oscillation
completed_tasks.learning: Dynamic approach target (weapon max range), weapon-first at distance 8, stalemate trigger 5→3 turns. 62% WR vs old v14 in 200-fight sim.

completed_tasks.subject: Build ranking tracker tool (SQLite)
completed_tasks.learning: API: /ranking/get-active/leek/talent/{page}/null (50/page). /ranking/get-leek-rank-active/{id}/talent for our rank. Rank #9325 at T333 L117.
